batch_limit.description: Maximum number of files in a single batch upload

dedup.phash_max_distance.description: Maximum Hamming distance for pHash near-duplicate match

dedup.fuzzy_min_ratio.description: Minimum Levenshtein similarity ratio (0–1) to flag as near-duplicate

camera_capture_enabled.description: Show camera capture input on mobile devices

scanner_import_enabled.description: Forward-compat flag; gates the scanner import UI button

auto_classify_enabled.description: Run AI classification on every uploaded file

auto_link_to_cif_policy.description: When to automatically link an uploaded document to an existing CIF record

extraction_confidence_floor_low.description: Confidence below this value is displayed as low (warn user to verify)

extraction_confidence_floor_high.description: Confidence at or above this value is displayed as high (auto-fill without warning)
